stemHtml: An aeroplane maintains straight and level flight at a speed of 2VS. A vertical gust causes a load factor of 3. If the same aircraft at the same weight was instead at a speed of 1.4VS, determine the load factor, n, caused by the same gust.

options.a: Not greater than 1.96, because the aeroplane will stall with any higher load factor than this at 1.4VS
